seoDescription: Review availability targets, response expectations, and service credit terms for deAPI plans.

elements.text: This SLA outlines platform availability targets, response commitments, and service credit handling.

hero.heading: Service Level Agreement
hero.body: The SLA defines uptime targets and incident handling expectations for teams running production AI workloads.

sections.title: Availability Targets
sections.body: Availability objectives are defined by plan level and measured over monthly service windows.

cards.title: Uptime Objectives
cards.description: Track monthly service availability with transparent measurement boundaries.

cards.title: Maintenance Windows
cards.description: Planned maintenance is scheduled to reduce impact on production workloads.

cards.title: Dependency Boundaries
cards.description: Certain upstream provider outages may affect service behavior outside direct platform control.

sections.title: Incident Response and Credits
sections.body: Incident handling includes classification, communication, and remediation paths where applicable.

cards.title: Response Workflow
cards.description: Incidents are triaged by severity and escalated to the appropriate on-call team.

cards.title: Service Credits
cards.description: Eligible credits are calculated based on SLA terms and validated outage windows.

cards.title: Support Coordination
cards.description: Enterprise teams can coordinate post-incident reviews with technical support.

contactPanel.heading: Need SLA clarification for procurement?
contactPanel.body: We can support procurement and legal reviews with plan-specific SLA guidance.
contactPanel.responseTime: SLA questions answered in one business day
